---
pagetitle: "CV"
---

<div class="page-hero">

<p class="hero-label">Curriculum Vitae</p>

<h1>CV and Professional Background</h1>

<h2>Education, skills, and Boston University work experience</h2>

<p>
My CV provides an overview of my education, technical skills, project management background, and work experience at Boston University.
</p>

<p>
<a class="btn btn-primary" href="files/Lutong_Wen_CV.pdf">Download my CV</a>
</p>

</div>

## Professional Background Summary

<div class="wide-card">
<p>
I have an academic background in Applied Business Analytics and Project Management. My experience includes graduate-level analytics projects, GitHub-based portfolio development, AWS lab work, Tableau dashboards, and project management coursework.
</p>
</div>

## Education and Skills

<div class="card-grid">

<div class="info-card">
<h3>Education</h3>
<p><strong>Boston University Metropolitan College</strong><br>
Master of Science in Project Management, January 2025</p>

<p><strong>University of Massachusetts Boston</strong><br>
Bachelor of Science in Management, Leadership and Organizational Change, May 2023<br>
Bachelor of Arts in Labor Studies, May 2023</p>

<p>
I am currently continuing my academic development in Applied Business Analytics at Boston University MET.
</p>
</div>

<div class="info-card">
<h3>Technical Skills</h3>
<ul>
<li>Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint, Word, and Microsoft Project</li>
<li>Tableau, GitHub, Quarto, Python, SQL, and AWS fundamentals</li>
<li>Trello, Asana, Monday.com, and Smartsheet</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="info-card">
<h3>Business and Project Tools</h3>
<ul>
<li>SWOT, PESTEL, VRIO, and Balanced Scorecard</li>
<li>Risk Matrix and Stakeholder Analysis Matrix</li>
<li>Agile, Waterfall, and Hybrid project management methods</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="info-card">
<h3>Languages</h3>
<ul>
<li>English</li>
<li>Mandarin Chinese</li>
<li>Shandong Dialect</li>
</ul>
</div>

</div>

## Experience Highlights

<div class="wide-card">
<p>
At Boston University, I have worked as a Graduate Teaching Assistant, Operations Assistant, and Special Events Assistant. These roles helped me build experience in academic support, assignment evaluation, operations coordination, event support, communication, and time-sensitive task management.
</p>

<p>
My project management background helps me connect technical analytics work with planning, communication, stakeholder needs, and practical business value.
</p>
</div>
